sidechain_spatial_exclusion_census.encounter_census: Cartesian product of exact side-chain heavy-atom graph counts
sidechain_spatial_exclusion_census.encounter_census_role: recorded exact heavy-atom Cartesian product; not a multiplier of the binary hard-exclusion stratum
sidechain_spatial_exclusion_census.exclusion_unit: generated mean adjacent C-alpha squared step
sidechain_spatial_exclusion_census.reach: sidechain_heavy_atom_count / (count + 1) of generated adjacent C-alpha step
